title: West Bengal elections: Calcutta HC modifies its order after appeal by poll body, says biking in groups not allowed
description: The Calcutta High Court on Monday expanded restrictions on motorcycle use during the ongoing West Bengal elections, directing that not only motorbike rallies but group riding on two wheelers will also be barred on polling day and two days prior to the polling day.Effectively, riding motorcycles in groups will not be allowed from April 27 to April 29. The second phase of West Bengal elections is scheduled to be held on April 29.A Division Bench of Justice Shampa Sarkar and Justice Ajay Kumar Gupt
